reviews.review_msg: This class was total bs. Sure Rina knew her stuff, but was not that great at teaching it. This class was very useless. Do not take it if you do not have to. She was definitely a tough grader as well

This is a very odd class. There was no syllabus given, so you never knew what you were walking into week by week. Rina is an interesting professor, but the class and concepts were easy. YOU NEED TO SHOW UP to pass the course. The lectures were quite boring, but you do need to pay attention because the midterm is all based on in-class content.

The course concepts were really easy, and even more so if you have taken Math190 previously. However, Rina was not the best at teaching these concepts, and you basically have to teach them to yourself, either using outside sources or the textbook. Lectures were unnecessarily long for the course concepts. Also made distasteful comments and examples.

Honestly the concepts were easy, Rina was not a good teacher, she did examples on the board without explaining and you were just expected to follow along. Rina also made many out of pocket comments that should never be said in a educational setting, Do yourself a favour and don't take this class with her.

EDUC 475 intersession, elementary math for PDP. Glad she's been consistent, she is still really funny and tells great stories. No exams thankfully, but 2 individual assignments and 6 group projects. Pretty hard marker. She's very bold, never afraid to tell u from right or wrong. Won't sugar coat anything. her 1st time teaching elem math

Are you weak at math? Don't take her class or get a tutor. I'm weak in math and i failed the course. She's a nice lady but the material is difficult. The first mid-term was not hard but the second and final were painful!
Rina is super nice and friendly! The class is okay, not hard and not easy. She makes the class fun and she's funny without even trying. If you need help, go to workshop or ask her. She's great!
Rina is amazing.  She made the subject come to life.  Without her help I would not be pursuing mathematics now

she's awesome! best class, best teacher
 she's really funny and shes super helpful. do the homework and the exams will be easy.
 dont sit in the back rows if she says not to and dont fall asleep in class...she'll make fun of you (but in a nice way)
